title: Prehistoric Dweller
description: A Evolved Scary Cave monster into minecraft
body:
This is a brand new cave monster horror mod that makes the original Cave Dweller feel like it was never scary… this one is on a whole different level.

The creature comes with terrifying new features, unpredictable behavior, and intense encounters that keep you on edge the entire time. It can extinguish light sources, climb through caves and surfaces, and stalk you in ways that feel way too real.

Remember tho, your not alone in the caves...
